note_text: Wound note - Leftplantar. Meas 1.0x2.9x1.3cm. Light serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 75% gran, 25% slough. Periwound erythematous. Foam dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Bergstrom notified.

Pt seen for wound eval. Diabetic Left plantar measures aprx 1.0 x 2.9cm, depth 1.3cm.
Min drainage serous. Heel wound also eval - R heel 0.6x1.7, 0.7cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
